Renowned Italian football manager Fabio Capello has shared his insights on the upcoming crucial Serie A match between Inter Milan and Napoli. The former coach believes this game could be pivotal in the race for the Scudetto, with Antonio Conte making his return to San Siro. Capello praised Simone Inzaghi’s decision to rest Alessandro Bastoni and Federico Dimarco in the midweek Champions League match against Arsenal. “Inzaghi was very wise,” Capello said. “He spared the left side of Inter from dealing with a tricky customer like Saka. arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Napoli: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Inter Milan gear up for their highly anticipated match against Napoli, manager Simone Inzaghi finds himself with a wealth of options for his starting lineup. Following his unexpected team selection in the midweek Champions League fixture against Arsenal, Inzaghi has the luxury of further rotation, with only Carlos Augusto unavailable due to injury. The return of experienced center-back Francesco Acerbi to full training adds another dimension to Inzaghi’s defensive choices. After being an unused substitute in the Arsenal match, Acerbi could potentially make his return to the starting eleven this weekend.
